summary: Iteration 2 re-test: All fixes from iteration 1 verified working. Cross-platform delete confirm dialog (window.confirm on web) accepts/dismisses correctly with full AsyncStorage sync. Inline validation errors show with red border and helper messages, and clear when user types. CRUD + persistence on reload all working. 16/16 frontend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: 'shadow*' style props deprecated warnings in expo logs (use 'boxShadow') — non-blocking but worth migrating for RN 0.76+ on web.
seed_data_creation: Test created 2 items in localStorage (@inventory_items) during run. Storage was cleared at start. Final state: 1 item ('Indomie Goreng EDITED').
context_for_next_testing_agent: App URL: https://inventory-crud-5.preview.emergentagent.com. Note: preview tunnel returned 502 initially — required ~30s to come up after `supervisorctl restart expo`. The form modal extends below 667px viewport; use 1024px+ height OR scroll_into_view_if_needed before clicking save-btn. For dialog handling on web confirm, use page.on('dialog', handler) with d.accept()/d.dismiss(). Existing testIDs: add-item-fab, input-name, input-category, input-price, input-stock, save-btn, cancel-btn, edit-btn-{id}, delete-btn-{id}, item-card-{id}, item-name-{id}, item-stock-{id}, error-name, error-category, error-price, error-stock, form-modal, app-header.
rca_of_issue: N/A - all features working as expected.
verified_flows: Inline validation: empty submit shows 4 inline error <Text>s (testIDs error-name/category/price/stock) with red border (rgb(220,38,38)) on inputs
Error self-clear: typing in errored field removes its error message while leaving others intact
Delete cancellation: window.confirm dismiss keeps item in list AND in localStorage
Delete confirmation: window.confirm accept removes item from list AND from localStorage (@inventory_items key)
Add item: 2 items added, both render correctly with name/category/price (Rp formatted)/stock
Edit item: name update reflected in UI immediately
Persistence: page reload restores edited item from AsyncStorage
